key_signals: 4h and 1d structure stay bullish: trend regime is bull across 15m/4h/1d, price is 94.65 above the 7d AVWAP 2076.14, and 4h/1d value support still holds.

Higher-timeframe flow is net positive: 4h CVD is +193674.456 futures and +10272.969 spot with 4h whale delta +114648946.883 USDT; 1d CVD is +249144.869 futures and +11458.811 spot with 1d whale delta +232147636.575 USDT.

The immediate auction is rotational, not impulsive: TPO POC is 2169.77 with current value 2166.64-2178.79, price is near 15m RVWAP 2171.718, and 15m futures whales sold -1415549.057 USDT while order book OFI/OBI are negative.

Short-term sell pressure has been absorbed at structure: fresh selling exhaustion confirmed at 2166.56 and recent bullish absorption printed at 2172.91, while VPIN remains high/toxic at 0.656978 and funding is stretched at 0.0001.

stage_1_setup_scan_json.market_narrative: 15m: I label the immediate state Sideways because price 2170.79 is rotating around current auction fair value rather than expanding. The structural bracket I used is TPO VAL 2166.64 and TPO VAH 2178.79, with TPO POC 2169.77; price is almost on the POC and inside value. That is reinforced by 15m RVWAP 2171.718 with z_price_minus_rvwap -0.04 and the 15m volume profile POC 2173.0 with local VA 2170.99-2173.85. Those are bearish/neutral intraday signals, but they hit support and failed to break it: selling_exhaustion confirmed at pivot 2166.56 with score 0.901937 and spot_exhaustion_confirm=true, bullish_absorption printed at pivot 2172.91, and the latest divergence event was hidden_bullish_divergence with score 0.79788. The contradiction to a Sideways label is that the EMA regime is still bull and the larger trend remains strong above AVWAP, but because price is auctioning around POC/value instead of accepting above 2178.79 or failing below 2166.64, I override the broader bullish backdrop and keep the immediate 15m label as Sideways. 4h: I label 4h Bullish. The structural range I used is 4h value support 2163.58 and resistance 2200.3 from the 4h price/volume structure. Price is still well above the 7d AVWAP 2076.14, above 4h EMA100 2035.69 and EMA200 2007.68, and the regime is bull. I override those because they read as pullback/overheating within a still-intact bullish structure, not as 4h structural failure while 2163.58-2163.32 holds. 1d: I label 1d Bullish. Contradictions: current price is below the daily POC 2185.0, the current session TPO is balanced around 2169.77 inside 2166.64-2178.79, funding is crowded long, and the prior completed day had negative daily delta (-22903.317 futures, -5920.723 spot) despite a strong up candle, implying some short-covering/absorption rather than perfectly clean spot-led trend. I override those because the broader daily trend, VWAP location, whale flow, and cumulative delta all still point up. Cross-timeframe relation: 4h and 1d are bullish, while 15m is a rotational digestion inside value after a sharp markup. The dominant context is bullish higher-timeframe control with short-term execution noise: CVD and whales are bullish on 4h/1d but mixed-to-bearish on 15m, TPO says the current auction is balanced around 2169.77, absorption and selling_exhaustion around 2166.56-2172.91 favor dip support, and buying_exhaustion signals cluster much lower around 2094-2118 and have largely been overrun by price. That leaves ETH in a bullish larger trend, but currently rotating under 2178.79/2202.87 resistance with a choppy, toxic short-term tape.
